relations.note: The copy lockup is always rendered inside the stylized typographic treatment.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Maintain the conceptual campaign identity and specific brand typographic treatment honoring dermatomyositis.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in Agenda font (fallback: 'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif) in ALL CAPS, left-aligned, stacked as three lines in hero placements. The letters 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of the headline color, using either Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) or Gold/Sunshine (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) colorways.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

rules.intent: Maintain the integrity of the medically and legally approved campaign claim lockup.
